title: Lock the tracked changes removal contract and commit-history trust boundary
summary: Define that tracked `.prism/state` keeps only current semantic state, shared runtime becomes the sole append-log owner for changes, signed Git commit history becomes the coarse-grained durable change history, and the PRISM manifest carries structured publish metadata including a short `publishSummary`.

acceptance.label: Specs and contracts explicitly state that tracked `.prism/state/changes/**` is not part of the durable repo-owned authority model
The trust boundary between signed Git commits, PRISM manifest metadata, and shared-runtime journals is locked without ambiguity
